meta.title: Build safe and reliable LLM applications with guardrails in this new course
meta.description:
Enroll for free: https://bit.ly/4ero9Zu

Learn to build safe, production-ready LLM applications!

In our new course, Safe and Reliable AI via Guardrails, taught by Shreya Rajpal, co-founder & CEO of GuardrailsAI, you’ll learn to use guardrails to prevent common LLM issues like hallucinations, sensitive information leaks, and off-topic responses.

Through hands-on exercises, you’ll add guardrails to a RAG-powered customer service chatbot, implementing techniques that validate and verify inputs and outputs. You’ll also explore pre-built guardrails from the GuardrailsAI hub and learn to build custom protections, including PII detection and focused response controls.

In detail, you’ll: 

- Identify common issues like hallucinations, off-topic replies, sensitive info leaks, and reputation risks.
- Use input and output guards to validate and verify responses, reducing these risks.
- Prevent your chatbot from discussing confidential topics, such as internal projects.
- Use an NLI model to ensure responses are based on trusted information.
- Detect and redact sensitive information in user prompts and outputs.
- Limit responses to relevant topics, keeping conversations focused.
- Prevent mentions of competitors with a name detection pipeline and entity recognition.

This course equips you to confidently build and deploy safe, reliable LLM-powered applications ready for real-world use.

Learn more: https://bit.ly/4ero9Zu
